description: Execute a shell command. Commands run in the project's work directory by default. Sync mode (async=false): returns combined stdout+stderr output after command exits. Async mode (async=true): returns task_id immediately; poll with process_task_status for partial_output later. For long-running servers (npm run dev, python -m http.server), ALWAYS use async=true to avoid timeout. To run in a different directory, prefix with 'cd <dir> &&' (e.g. 'cd subdir && npm install'). On Windows: use 'cd /d' for cross-drive changes (e.g. 'cd /d D:\project && npm install'), otherwise cd silently fails across drives. Example: {"command": "echo hello"}
name: execute_command

async.description: If true, returns immediately with task_id. Poll with process_task_status.
